---
name: Security Issue
about: Responsibly report a security vulnerability in Red Bank
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: 'security, critical'
assignees: ''
---

## ⚠️ SECURITY WARNING
**STOP**: If you have found a critical security vulnerability that exposes PII, biological data, or system integrity, **DO NOT open a public GitHub issue.**

Please refer to our [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) policy and email your findings immediately to **[security@redbank.example.com]**.

If this is a non-critical security improvement or a dependency update (e.g., upgrading a library with a moderate CVE), you may proceed.

## 🔒 Security Issue Description
A clear and concise description of the security concern or vulnerable dependency.

## 📉 Current Behavior
Describe how the current implementation is vulnerable.

## 📈 Proposed Solution
Describe the recommended fix, library upgrade, or architectural change.

## 🔄 Reproduction Steps
If applicable, how can this security flaw be verified? (Do not post destructive payloads publicly).

## 💻 Environment Setup
- **Affected Component**: [e.g., Flutter App, Spring Boot Backend, PostGIS]
- **Affected Version**: [e.g., 1.0.0]

## ⚡ Severity (CVSS Estimate)
- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

## ✅ Pre-flight Checklist
- [ ] I have read the `SECURITY.md` guidelines.
- [ ] I confirm this issue does NOT expose immediate risk to production data (if it does, email us instead).

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any relevant CVE links, articles, or logs here.
